records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that these employees whom you'd been giving a lot of thought were absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with them, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called them to your office. They said they'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagten, sie wollen bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous les avez convoqu959s dans votre bureau. Ils ne devraient pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Squire! I heard you wanted to see me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Squire! I heard you wanted to see me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Squire! I heard you wanted to see me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ooh. What should I say next...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ooh. What should I say next...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ooh. What should I say next...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robin, the Administrator called for you, not me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robin, the Administrator called for you, not me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robin, the Administrator called for you, not me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is inappropriate to speak to him while using me as a shield.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is inappropriate to speak to him while using me as a shield.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is inappropriate to speak to him while using me as a shield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Squire? So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Squire? So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Squire? So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, thank you for the holiday gift you sent me last time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, thank you for the holiday gift you sent me last time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, thank you for the holiday gift you sent me last time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The canned tuna was really good. And the rice cake was sweet as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The canned tuna was really good. And the rice cake was sweet as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The canned tuna was really good. And the rice cake was sweet as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so pleased that I can go on a food tour in my free time, thanks to my steady income.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so pleased that I can go on a food tour in my free time, thanks to my steady income.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so pleased that I can go on a food tour in my free time, thanks to my steady income.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Do I have something on my mind? Is it that obvious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Do I have something on my mind? Is it that obvious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Do I have something on my mind? Is it that obvious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... To be honest, I've never talked about this with anyone before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... To be honest, I've never talked about this with anyone before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... To be honest, I've never talked about this with anyone before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, I can't resist when I see something that looks delicious. It was okay to eat a lot when I was traveling the world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, I can't resist when I see something that looks delicious. It was okay to eat a lot when I was traveling the world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, I can't resist when I see something that looks delicious. It was okay to eat a lot when I was traveling the world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But these days, I feel like I'm gaining a little bit of weight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But these days, I feel like I'm gaining a little bit of weight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But these days, I feel like I'm gaining a little bit of weight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right. It's not bad to eat tasty dishes to my heart's content.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right. It's not bad to eat tasty dishes to my heart's content.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right. It's not bad to eat tasty dishes to my heart's content.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But recently, Miss Aura said, <color=#ffd34c>"Your cheeks have gotten chubbier, Robin."</color> And that's when I realized something was wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But recently, Miss Aura said, <color=#ffd34c>"Your cheeks have gotten chubbier, Robin."</color> And that's when I realized something was wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But recently, Miss Aura said, <color=#ffd34c>"Your cheeks have gotten chubbier, Robin."</color> And that's when I realized something was wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I keep giving in to my desires...! My head might not fit Ms. Aura! Then, it'll really be a disaster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I keep giving in to my desires...! My head might not fit Ms. Aura! Then, it'll really be a disaster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I keep giving in to my desires...! My head might not fit Ms. Aura! Then, it'll really be a disaster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean, you'd put your trust in me, even without Ms. Aura...? Why would you say something so burdensome...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean, you'd put your trust in me, even without Ms. Aura...? Why would you say something so burdensome...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean, you'd put your trust in me, even without Ms. Aura...? Why would you say something so burdensome...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Starting today, I'm going on a diet and walking 100,000 steps daily!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Starting today, I'm going on a diet and walking 100,000 steps daily!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Starting today, I'm going on a diet and walking 100,000 steps daily!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's not because of Ms. Aura this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. It's not because of Ms. Aura this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's not because of Ms. Aura this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just want to impress you... because you actually care about me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just want to impress you... because you actually care about me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just want to impress you... because you actually care about me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know that it won't be easy to fill Ms. Aura's shoes, but..
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know that it won't be easy to fill Ms. Aura's shoes, but..
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know that it won't be easy to fill Ms. Aura's shoes, but..

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a knight myself, I'll try my best to become someone who can support you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a knight myself, I'll try my best to become someone who can support you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a knight myself, I'll try my best to become someone who can support you.
